history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An interface-style screen shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner and a level progress panel with various statistics and a circular avatar image.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a large rounded rectangle panel on a dark, purple gradient background, featuring a header that reads “LEVEL UP!” and a central set of level and experience indicators, along with three smaller stat boxes and a small percentage value to the right of a horizontal progress bar.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital UI screen, likely presented on a flat display. The background is dark with a purple-to-blue gradient and subtle lighting effects.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in gold/yellow with decorative chevrons on both sides. Inside the main rounded panel, near the top left area, there is a bold white text label that reads “alok ep ep” and a small pill-shaped badge to its right that contains “#5” in yellow/gold. Below that, “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller gray text. A circular avatar sits on the left side, outlined with a purple ring; inside the circle is a collage-like image of an anime-style illustration with multiple small elements around it. To the right of the avatar are two large rounded rectangles: the left one shows “LEVEL” above a large white “5,” and the right one shows “EXPERIENCE” above “0 / 300” with “0 / 300” in white and the container in a dark teal-green color. Beneath the two rectangles is a long horizontal, dark bar area representing progress, and near the right end of this bar there is a visible “0%” in gray/white. Below the progress area are three smaller dark rounded boxes labeled “MESSAGES” with a large “165,” “XP NEEDED” with a large “300,” and “NEXT LVL” with a large “6.” At the bottom center of the panel, faint text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” in a very low-contrast gray.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
alok ep ep
#5
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
5
EXPERIENCE
0 / 300
0%
MESSAGES
165
XP NEEDED
300
NEXT LVL
6
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a level progress UI screen celebrating a level up, showing the user’s level and experience progress. It includes a circular avatar and several stat boxes for messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
